themes.label: Salvation
themes.summary: This chapter speaks of rescue, deliverance, redemption, life, or being saved. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Make haste, O God, to deliver me; make haste to help me, O LORD. This urgent plea opens Psalm...". Cross references echo "Salvation".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 1 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: לְהַצִּילֵ֑נִי: to deliver - to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense

themes.label: Love
themes.summary: This chapter foregrounds love, affection, covenant loyalty, or sacrificial care. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Let all those that seek thee rejoice and be glad in thee: and let such as love thy salvation...". Cross references echo "Love".
